.editorconfig.general_idea: Remove Java-specific indentation rule from editorconfig
Add CRLF line ending rule for Windows script files

.github/workflows/github-actions.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 for the main build and test jobs.
Add Java 21 specific test configurations to the generation matrix to ensure compatibility with the new minimum runtime.

.gitignore.general_idea: Remove a specific test file from gitignore to allow it to be tracked in the repository.
Add exceptions to gitignore to ensure Gradle wrapper JARs are tracked.
Add exceptions to gitignore to ensure Maven wrapper JARs are tracked.
Ignore CI process ID files generated during testing.
Ignore roadmap PNG files except for the specific Spring Boot project diagram.
Refactor VS Code gitignore to ignore the directory but explicitly include configuration files.
Ignore .history directory used by file history plugins.
Ignore Angular cache and distribution directories.
Ignore personal Spring Boot application configuration profiles.
Remove outdated exception for Maven wrapper JAR in the templates section.

.lintstagedrc.js.general_idea: Add ESLint execution for JavaScript and TypeScript files in lint-staged configuration.
Add Stylelint execution for CSS and SCSS files in lint-staged configuration.
Add Pug linting execution for Pug files in lint-staged configuration.
Refactor Prettier glob patterns to exclude files handled by other linters and include new file types like XML.

.prettierignore.general_idea: Exclude Gradle generator Java files from Prettier ignore list to enable formatting

.prettierrc.general_idea: Add Prettier plugins for XML and Java formatting support
Replace deprecated jsxBracketSameLine option with bracketSameLine
Remove Java-specific overrides in favor of the prettier-plugin-java
Add XML whitespace sensitivity configuration for Prettier

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper script to version 3.2.0, which includes modernization of shell logic, removal of deprecated M2_HOME handling, and updated download URLs.
mvnw.after: # Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0

mvnw.general_idea: Remove support for the deprecated M2_HOME environment variable and associated path resolution logic.
mvnw.before:
if [ -z "$M2_HOME" ] ; then
  ## resolve links - $0 may be a link to maven's home
  PRG="$0"
  ...

mvnw.general_idea: Update the default Maven Wrapper JAR download URL from the old Takari group (0.5.6) to the new Apache Maven group (3.2.0).
Update the Maven Wrapper launcher class from the old Plexus Classworlds launcher to the new Apache Maven Wrapper main class.
Remove the -Dmaven.home system property from the Java execution command, as it is no longer used by the new wrapper.
Add support for MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS environment variable in the Java execution command.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Guava dependency which is no longer used or compatible with the new stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: Guava may conflict with newer libraries or is simply removed to reduce footprint; keeping it might cause runtime conflicts or unused dependency warnings.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Mustache compiler dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mustache is no longer used in the project; keeping it adds unnecessary bloat.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for Bean Validation support in Spring Boot 3 applications.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Starter Actuator dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for health checks and metrics in the new application setup.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Model dependency for programmatic POM manipulation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for the new functionality that reads/writes Maven POMs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Joox dependency for XML processing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for new XML processing features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Dom4j dependency for XML processing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for new XML processing features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Night-Config TOML dependency for configuration parsing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for new TOML configuration support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add SnakeYAML dependency for YAML processing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for YAML configuration support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Starter Data MongoDB dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for MongoDB integration in the new application.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Mongock Spring Boot V3 dependency for MongoDB migrations.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for database migration support compatible with Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add MongoDB Spring Data V4 Driver dependency for Mongock.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for Mongock to interact with MongoDB via Spring Data.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add ByteBuddy dependency for mocking/testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for advanced mocking capabilities in tests.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Cucumber JUnit Platform Engine dependency for BDD testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to run Cucumber tests with JUnit 5.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Cucumber Java dependency for BDD testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to write Cucumber step definitions in Java.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Cucumber Spring dependency for BDD testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to integrate Cucumber with Spring context.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JUnit Platform Suite dependency for test aggregation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to run suites of tests including Cucumber.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Awaitility dependency for asynchronous testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for waiting on asynchronous operations in tests.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Testcontainers MongoDB dependency for integration testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to run integration tests against a real MongoDB instance.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JGit version to 6.7.0 for Java 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JGit versions may not support Java 21 or have known issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update ArchUnit version to 1.1.0 for Java 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older ArchUnit versions may not support Java 21 bytecode analysis.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Compiler Plugin version to 3.11.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures compatibility with newer Maven and Java versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire Plugin version to 3.2.1.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures compatibility with newer Maven and JUnit versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update test exclusion patterns to use CucumberTest suffix.
pom.xml.why_exists: Aligns test execution with the new Cucumber-based test structure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update test inclusion patterns to use CucumberTest suffix.
pom.xml.why_exists: Aligns test execution with the new Cucumber-based test structure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Frontend Maven Plugin to build frontend assets.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to build the web application during the Maven lifecycle.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Checksum Maven Plugin to track frontend changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to skip frontend builds if no changes are detected.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Antrun Plugin to evaluate frontend checksums.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to conditionally skip frontend builds based on checksums.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Javadoc Plugin for documentation generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to generate Javadoc for releases.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Source Plugin for source jar generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to attach source jars for releases.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Git Commit ID Plugin for build metadata.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to embed git commit information in the build.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Checkstyle Plugin for code quality enforcement.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to enforce coding standards.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Sonar Maven Plugin for code analysis.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to integrate with SonarQube.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Jar Plugin execution for test-jar.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to create a test-jar artifact for sharing test utilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Maven Plugin for repackaging.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to create executable Spring Boot jars.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Native Maven Plugin for GraalVM native image support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to build native images.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add GPG Plugin for signing artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to sign artifacts for release to Maven Central.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Nexus Staging Plugin for deploying to Maven Central.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required to deploy artifacts to OSSRH.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Enforcer plugin version to 3.4.1.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures compatibility with newer Maven versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven version requirement to 3.9.5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the build uses a compatible Maven version.
